case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. VS CARCACHE, PEDRO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CARCACHE, PEDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CARCACHE, PEDRO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARCACHE, PEDRO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,050.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CARCACHE, PEDRO HEARING SET FOR JUN-26-1995 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-26-1995, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARCACHE, PEDRO $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $66.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,066.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CARCACHE, PEDRO
